posts.author: rk1771
posts.text: Anlon Technology Solutions Limited (ANLON) recently approved a significant fundraising move via a preferential issue . Following a board meeting on May 1, 2026 , the company outlined plans to strengthen its capital base to support its engineering and airport services operations. Issue Size: Up to 1,254,400 equity shares of face value ₹10 each. Issue Price: Fixed at ₹398.50 per share (which includes a premium of ₹388.50). Target Investors: The shares are to be issued on a preferential basis to Non-Promoter category investors. Several specialized funds are picking up significant portions of the…

posts.text: ANLON_01052026192016_OUTCOME_01052026.pdf (378.2 KB) Two new update, CEO of rosenbauer first time visit plant & company doing fund rise of 50 cr.
